repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Vice Provost for Land Grant Affairs records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Vice Provost for Land Grant Affairs

did.abstract: Includes Francille Firebaugh's correspondence, speeches and presentations, committee material and university related material.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes Francille Firebaugh's correspondence, speeches and presentations, committee material and university related material.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Vice Provost for Land Grant Affairs records, #4-13-3427. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
